steps.title: Identify all roots from the factored form
steps.content:
The equation $x^2(2x - 11)(2x - u) = 0$ breaks into three factors, each giving a root:
  • $x^2 = 0 \Rightarrow x = 0$ with multiplicity 2
  • $2x - 11 = 0 \Rightarrow x = \frac{11}{2}$
  • $2x - u = 0 \Rightarrow x = \frac{u}{2}$

steps.title: Sum all roots and solve for u
steps.content:
The sum of all roots (counting multiplicity) equals 16:
$$0 + 0 + \frac{11}{2} + \frac{u}{2} = 16$$
Combine the fractions on the left:
$$\frac{11 + u}{2} = 16$$
Multiply both sides by 2:
$$11 + u = 32$$
Therefore $u = 21$.
